title: Use Oban.Testing.with_testing_mode/2 to switch modes mid-test
prompt: Write a test at `test/my_app/scheduled_jobs_test.exs` that normally runs with `testing: :inline` but temporarily switches to `:manual` for a specific scheduled-job assertion. Use `Oban.Testing.with_testing_mode(:manual, fn -> MyApp.Workers.ScheduledWorker.new(%{"delay" => 3600}) |> Oban.insert() |> then(&assert_enqueued(worker: MyApp.Workers.ScheduledWorker)) end)` inside the test body.
